data.name: CUM Queens 🔞💦
data.detailed_description:
Welcome to the captivating world of CUM Queens🔞💦 - a game that will turn your life into an extraordinary journey through the galaxies of entertainment and unpredictable adventures!

Mia and Aisha are unrivaled queens of intergalactic media influence. They not only create content but also capture the hearts of viewers, starting from the Chumak Way and reaching the far corners of space. Their mission is to gain the most recognition and fame in the entire known Universe!

Join Mia and Aisha's team in a grand cosmic adventure where each stream is a chance to shape the future of the media galaxy. They have not only an engaging interactive audience but also their own team of professionals and a producer who keeps a finger on the pulse of the storyline.

However, in this celestial rating, challenges abound. Haters truly test the resilience of Mia and Aisha, attempting to undermine their popularity. Dedicated fans become true allies, not only offering support but also making substantial donations, making each stream special.

This is a game for the bold, for those ready to immerse themselves in the world of cosmic entertainment and unforeseen twists. CUM Queens🔞💦 is not just a game; it's a true cosmic greatness waiting for you to define your path in this boundless Universe of entertainment!

And remember, CUM Queens🔞💦 is an adult clicker game, adding an extra layer of excitement to your cosmic journey!

data.short_description: Welcome to the captivating world of CUM Queens🔞💦 - an adult clicker game that will turn your life into an extraordinary journey through the galaxies of entertainment and unpredictable adventures!
data.supported_languages:
英文*, 俄文, 法文, 義大利文, 德文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 阿拉伯文, 保加利亞文, 越南文, 希臘文, 丹麥文, 簡體中文, 繁體中文, 韓文, 挪威文, 荷蘭文, 波蘭文, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西, 葡萄牙文 - 葡萄牙, 羅馬尼亞文, 泰文, 土耳其文, 匈牙利文, 烏克蘭文, 芬蘭文, 捷克文, 瑞典文, 日文, 印尼語, 西班牙文 - 拉丁美洲
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 or higher
  • 處理器: Intel or AMD
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX compatible graphics card
  • 儲存空間: 3 GB 可用空間
